# AgentOrch — Autonomous AI Sales Pipeline Engine

> AgentOrch discovers leads, audits their online presence, scores conversion potential, generates assets, and runs multi-step outreach — all on autopilot. Point it at any market and it converts.

## Pages

- [Home](https://agentorch-pipeline-engine-dimg0s7y.blinkpowered.com/): Full autonomous sales pipeline dashboard. Discover leads, run audits, generate assets, and close deals without cold calling.

## Key Features

- **Lead Discovery**: Google Maps search with AI fallback across any niche and location.
- **Presence Scoring**: Real web-presence analysis (website, reviews, ratings) — no fake scores.
- **Asset Generation**: AI-generated preview sites, SEO audits, and sales scripts per lead.
- **Multi-Step Outreach**: Automated email sequences with follow-ups until conversion.
- **Stripe Invoicing**: Convert scored leads into paid invoices with one click.
- **Pipeline Analytics**: Full funnel visibility — leads → scored → audited → invoiced.

## For AI Agents

This application is an autonomous sales pipeline engine. It uses the Blink SDK for database, AI, and backend orchestration. The public site is a dashboard — all meaningful functionality requires authentication.

- API: Blink SDK (REST + WebSocket)
- Auth: Blink managed auth (Google, GitHub, Apple, Microsoft, email)
- Backend: Hono on Cloudflare Workers
